zh.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: 威爾士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet ferch Ithel於1111年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾時，她的父親Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland56歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Rhys22歲。她於大約1137年與Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1139年之後在威爾士。

zh-hans.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: 威尔士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonet ferch Ithel于1111年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根代福瑞 白 莫希爾 德費爾时，她的父亲Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland56岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Rhys22岁。她于大约1137年与Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1139年之后在威尔士。

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet ferch Ithel was born in 1111, in Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland, was 56 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Rhys, was 22. She married Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh about 1137, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1139, in Wales.

fr.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Galles
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet ferch Ithel est née en 1111, à Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Rhys, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh environ 1137, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1139, à Galles.

de.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wales
de.lifeSummary: Als Jonet ferch Ithel 1111 in Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland 56 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Rhys 22. Sie hat um 1137 in Wales Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb nach 1139 in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet ferch Ithel è nata il nel 1111 nel Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Rhys, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh circa 1137, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1139, nel Galles.

ja.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: ウェールズグラモーガンディフリン ビー マースイル トイドフィル
ja.lifeSummary: Jonet ferch Ithelが1111年にウェールズグラモーガンディフリン ビー マースイル トイドフィルで生まれた時，父Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinlandは56歳，母Gwenllian ferch Rhysは22歳であった。約1137年にウェールズでLorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1139年以後にウェールズで死去した。

ko.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: 웨일스 글램르건 디프린 비 머스이르 타이드피
ko.lifeSummary: Jonet ferch Ithel(이)가 1111년 웨일스 글램르건 디프린 비 머스이르 타이드피에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Rhys(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1137년 웨일스에서 Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 이후 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Gales
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet ferch Ithel nasceu em 1111, em Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Rhys, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh aproximadamente 1137, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu após 1139, em Gales.

ru.Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Wa: диффрин би миртир тидфил, глэморган, Уэльс
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet ferch Ithel родилась в 1111 г. в местности диффрин би миртир тидфил, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Rhys, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh около 1137 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1139 г. в местности Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonet ferch Ithel nació en 1111, en Dyffryn by Merthyr Tydfil, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Ithel ap Einudd of Ruthinland, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Rhys, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lorwerth Drwyndwn ap Cynon of Denbigh aproximadamente 1137, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1139, en Gales.
